user_query: What did Caroline take away from the book "Becoming Nicole"?

selected_nodes.text: Caroline's friends, family, and mentors are her rocks, motivating her and giving her strength to push on.

selected_nodes.text: Caroline mentors a transgender teen and they work on building confidence and positive strategies.
